query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE establishmentId = 210015) as total_categorias,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 210015) as total_produtos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210015) as total_grupos_complemento,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210015) as total_itens_complemento;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE establishmentId = 210015) as total_categorias,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 210015) as total_produtos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210015) as total_grupos_complemento,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210015) as total_itens_complemento;
